domain: Persian carpet medallion 4-fold rotational symmetry (centralised medallion design balanced longitudinally + transversely; boteh teardrop repeat motif; 4-fold or 8-fold rotational symmetry around medallion center; weavers detect defective rotational consistency)
specific_mechanism: MEDALLION-ROT-DEFECT: 4-fold rotational symmetry defect detection + group-averaging repair for per-head feature maps. (1) Per attention head h, treat output feature map F_h as 2D spatial grid (rows × cols). (2) Apply 4-fold rotations {R₀, R₉₀, R₁₈₀, R₂₇₀} around feature-map center. (3) Defect score d_h = max_θ ||F_h − R_θ·F_h||_F (max Frobenius rotation-deviation). (4) Defect threshold: d_h > τ flags head h as defective. (5) Repair: project F_h toward symmetric subspace via group-averaging F_h^repair = (1/4)·Σ_θ R_θ·F_h. (6) Differs from R436 HUTSUL-PYSANKA by Persian-medallion 4-fold-specific defect-detection + group-averaging projection repair. (7) Applied to spatial-grid attention features (e.g., ViT or attention-map visualizations).
llm_application: MEDALLION-ROT-DEFECT 4-fold rotation-equivariance defect score per attention head + group-averaging symmetric-subspace projection repair + centerwise-rotation deviation. Differs from R436 HUTSUL-PYSANKA (closest — Pysanka 4-fold rotational equivariance; this adds explicit defect-score + group-averaging repair to Persian-medallion framing). R425 NDEBELE-TRIANGLE (boundary locus). R451 NGATU-DEFECT (RoPE-phase). R475 MAEDEUP-INVARIANT (knot crossing). R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT (graph-minor). R103 KNOT-CoT. Differs from PSC-YOLO 2025 (Pinwheel-shaped rotational conv — closest, but for conv kernels not attention head defect). Device Defect Rotational Symmetry. DSAT Dynamic Sparse Attention. FAX-Net Symmetric Attention. Differs by ATTENTION-HEAD FEATURE-MAP 4-FOLD ROTATIONAL EQUIVARIANCE + DEFECT SCORE + GROUP-AVERAGING SYMMETRIC REPAIR.
novelty_claim: PSC-YOLO + Device Defect Rotational + DSAT + FAX-Net + R436 HUTSUL-PYSANKA cover rotational symmetry + defect detection paradigm. MEDALLION-ROT-DEFECT adds (a) explicit 4-fold rotation defect score per attention head + (b) group-averaging projection repair + (c) Persian-medallion canonical pattern catalog. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: rotational symmetry feature map defect detection per head

llm_side: rotational symmetry feature map defect detection per head
